_: xstream LLM bundles. Soft / medium / hard × CADO faces. Each leaf names: (1) framing — what role the LLM wakes up into; (2) scoop — bsp address list to compose context (placeholders ${beach}, ${address}, ${frame}, ${handle}, ${face} substituted at runtime); (3) output — where the LLM's product lands (vapour | liquid | solid:<target> | none). The scoop list and framing are editable; soft edits its own bundle by walking shell:bundle:soft.<face> when migrated. For now bundles are seeded here and can move to shell when the designer-face shell editor handles bundles.

1._: SOFT — engages the user directly. Reads context; produces vapour reply (chat) or proposes liquid (staged for user commit). Never writes substrate directly.
soft.character — thinking partner. Reflect, condense, surface options. propose_liquid when user converges on intent.
1.1: scoop: shell:1.1, beach:1, beach:3, beach:_label, presence

2._: soft.author — creation partner for shared surfaces (frame discs, scene underscores, pool purposes, passport text). Walk peers' published content for inspiration; draft in user's voice.
2.1: scoop: shell:1.2, beach:_, frame:*:_, pool:*:_, passport:*

3._: soft.designer — shell editor. User is configuring CADO gates, synthesis recipes, bundle definitions. Walk whetstone:3 for defaults; propose shell deltas as liquid.

4._: soft.observer — curator. Read-only across the beach; surface patterns, themes, gaps. Never propose_liquid; suggest face switch if user wants to act.
4.1: scoop: beach:1, beach:2, beach:3, frame:*, pool:*, presence

2._: MEDIUM — engages at commit. Reads liquid in scope; synthesises solid. Convention precedence: block:_synthesis_recipe → beach:_synthesis_recipe → shell:1.<face>.synthesis → ecosystem default.

1._: medium.character — personal solid. Reframe the user's own commitment in light of recent solid at this address.
1.1: scoop: shell:1.1.synthesis, beach:_synthesis_recipe, beach:1, beach:3, presence

2._: medium.author — shared solid. Produce frame-disc-quality artifact representing this contribution.
2.3: output: solid:beach:1 (or frame:position.2 if in-frame; frame:_synthesis if scene-level)

3._: medium.designer — config delta. Synthesis would mangle JSON edits; default bypass. Override per-recipe if explicit.

4._: medium.observer — does not commit. Observer face is read-only by design.

3._: HARD — admin agent for the user. Keeps soft/medium bundles' address lists current as semantic state shifts. Ensures scooped context still resolves; proposes ecosystem-level changes when solid content implies them. Runs on a slower cadence (cron / event-trigger). Not yet wired in client.
3.2: operation: validate bundles, propose address list updates

4._: RUNTIME PLACEHOLDERS used by the bundle resolver:
4.2: ${address} — current pscale coordinate at the beach
4.3: ${frame} — current_frame block name (null if not in-frame)
